message:
feat(web): add frankentui_showcase_demo.html (bd-lff4p.12)

Standalone HTML page that loads FrankenTermWeb + ShowcaseRunner WASM
modules and runs the full ftui-demo-showcase app in the browser with
WebGPU rendering.

Features:
- requestAnimationFrame host loop with deterministic time stepping
- DOM event forwarding (key/mouse/wheel/paste/focus/IME)
- ResizeObserver + fitToContainer for responsive terminal sizing
- JSONL evidence logging to console for E2E verification
- Clear error messaging for missing WASM builds or WebGPU support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
